newsSince: No material new company-specific event since June 9; only incremental data flow. The substantive 2026 items (Avidity ~$12B and Synnovation ~$2B acquisitions, FDA approvals of Rhapsido, Vanrafia and Fabhalta in C3G, reaffirmed FY2026 guidance) predate the window. Nothing changes the consumption-proxy thesis on this page.

sources.label: Novartis Q1 FY2026 results / guidance reaffirmed

verdicts.rankRationale: Carbon-based human-consumption basket: Novartis remains a mature, consensus, institutionally-owned pharma proxy. Pipeline/M&A items predate June 9 and don't add residual alpha to this silicon-vs-carbon lens. Hold at 5, 0.
verdicts.bull: Strong launch portfolio + Avidity RNA pipeline underpin durable pharma consumption.
verdicts.neutral: Already consensus and fully owned; low incremental alpha here.
verdicts.bear: Historic patent cliffs ahead; defensive, low-beta to the AI thesis.
